plan.caption:
The Brilliant Stars Elite Trainer Box is one of the clearest sealed vs. open cases in the modern era.

The numbers: a sealed ETB runs $166. Crack it open and you are looking at an average return of $50 across 8 packs. That is a $116 gap you are giving up the moment you pull that tab. Charizard V is sitting at $346, Umbreon VMAX at $111, Mimikyu V at $85. The chase hits are real, but the math does not care about hope.

Verdict at pokeev.com: KEEP IT SEALED. The sealed premium is too significant to gamble on pack luck.

We ran every Brilliant Stars pull rate, every market price, and every scenario so you do not have to. Full breakdown lives at pokeev.com.

Rip or keep on this one? Drop your answer below.
